name: joai-ai-email
description: Connect AI Email to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.

interface.shortDescription: Connect AI Email to Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT through JoAi's hosted MCP app server.
interface.longDescription: Send personalized emails to contacts through your AI agent. The agent drafts the message from your intent, uses your configured email integration, and automatically creates a conversation room so replies route back to the right thread — no copy-paste, no lost context.
defaultPrompt: List the AI Email tools available in this app.
Explain what setup or authentication AI Email needs before I run an action.
Use AI Email to help me with the task I describe next.
